claim: VIOLATION: Two contracts at the same line produce a P2 check with no temporal gap
smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 113
; VIOLATION: Two contracts at the same line produce a P2 check with no temporal gap

(declare-const line_a Int)
(declare-const line_b Int)
(declare-const earlier_line Int)
(declare-const later_line Int)
(declare-const temporal_gap Int)   ; = later_line - earlier_line; must be > 0 for P2 to be meaningful

; Transition: both contracts are in the same function group
(assert (= line_a line_b))

; Transition: sort comparator returns 0 for equal lines → either ordering is valid
(assert (= earlier_line line_a))
(assert (= later_line line_b))

; Transition: temporal_gap computed from assigned ordering
(assert (= temporal_gap (- later_line earlier_line)))

; Violation: gap is zero → no mutation can have occurred between the two "points"
(assert (= temporal_gap 0))

(check-sat)
